archimate:Representation.name: RDF-XML
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: RDF-XML (Resource Description Framework XML) is a syntax format used to represent metadata and structured data in the form of Resource Description Framework (RDF) triples. RDF-XML provides a way to encode and exchange data using XML (eXtensible Markup Language) syntax.
Publisher: W3C
Source: https://www.w3.org/TR/rdf-syntax-grammar/
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/RDF-XMLRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/RDF-XMLRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: RDF-XML (Resource Description Framework XML) is a syntax format used to represent metadata and structured data in the form of Resource Description Framework (RDF) triples. RDF-XML provides a way to encode and exchange data using XML (eXtensible Markup Language) syntax.
